name: HRA_SECTION_DEFNS_B
description: This table contains the definition for a section.These sections can be included in a Performance Template.For example it stores whether the section is a competency section or goals section or overall ratings section etc.

columns.Name: SECTION_DEF_ID
columns.Comments: System generated Primary Key for Section Definition

columns.Name: ENABLE_MGR_REASON_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether manger has to give reason if manual Rating is different from Calculated Rating

columns.Name: REFERENCE_SECTION_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the reference to the current section in Profile Management

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: This is the date from which the section is valid.

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: End date of the section definition.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: This field stores the lookup code for the section status.

columns.Name: SECTION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: This field stores a lookup code for the section type.The section type describes how the system should process this section.

columns.Name: RATE_SECTION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to allow the user to enter a rating for the section, or for the system to calculate a rating for the section.

columns.Name: CALCULATION_RULE_CODE
columns.Comments: This field specifies the caluclation rule to be used when the section is to be rated.

columns.Name: FAST_FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the fast formula to be used when the section is to be rated by means of calculation using a fast formula.

columns.Name: SECTION_RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: This field iindicates the default rating model for the section.

columns.Name: WEIGHT_SECTION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the section can have a weighting relative to other sections within the performance document

columns.Name: SECTION_WEIGHT
columns.Comments: This is the default weight for a section.  Any numeric value between 1 and 100 can be entered.

columns.Name: SECTION_MIN_WEIGHT
columns.Comments: This is the minimum weight for a section.  This field is used when ratings are calculated by the system, to ensure that the section weight cannot fall below a minimum value.

columns.Name: ENABLE_ITEMS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the section will contain items such as specific competencies or goals. Typically this would be Yes for Competencies and goals, and No for all other sections such as Worker Final Feedback, Manager Final Feedback, etc.

columns.Name: CONTENT_PROFILE_FLAG
columns.Comments: This field indicates whether the section will refer to the content library when the user adds items.

columns.Name: CONTENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: This field stores the ID of a content type to be used in the section.

columns.Name: FREE_FORM_ALLOWED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will allow the user to add free-from items (that is, items that are not held in a library or table in the system), at the performance document.

columns.Name: ADD_ITEMS_CONFIRM_CRIT_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column describes whether the system will allow users to add items to the section (these items then represent the evaluation criteria for the worker).

columns.Name: RATE_ITEM_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the user can rate each item within the section.  This would be typically used for sections like Competencies and Goals.

columns.Name: RATING_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: This field indicates the rating type to apply for items in this section.

columns.Name: USE_SECRTG_FOR_PERFRTG_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will use the rating model specified for section, for all items within this section.

columns.Name: PERF_RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the rating model for performance ratings, if the section rating model is not being used.

columns.Name: ITEM_CALCULATION_CODE
columns.Comments: This field indicates the data that should be used when calculating the rating points for a specific item.

columns.Name: SHOW_TARGET_PERF_RTG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will display the target performance rating field at the performance template

columns.Name: SHOW_TARGET_PROF_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will display the target proficiency level field at the performance template

columns.Name: SHOW_SECTION_WEIGHT
columns.Comments: This indicates whether items in the section can have a weighting relative to other items in the same section.

columns.Name: SHOW_SECTION_MIN_WEIGHT
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the HR specialist can enter minimum weights at the performance template.  These minima are displayed on the performance document.

columns.Name: SHOW_MANDATORY
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the user can edit or delete items at the performance document.  This setting would typically be used in conjunction with integration with profile content, so that the user was presented with a suite of standard competencies and objectives within the performance document.

columns.Name: SHOW_CRITICAL
columns.Comments: This field indicates whether a content item is critical at the performance document.

columns.Name: SHOW_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will display the description of the content item from the content library, at the performance document.

columns.Name: SHOW_MEASUREMENT
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will display a Measurement field at the performance template.

columns.Name: SHOW_DUE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will display a due date field at the performance document, one date per item.

columns.Name: SHOW_REMINDER_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will display a reminder date field at the performance document, one date per item.

columns.Name: SHOW_OWNED_BY
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will display an owner field at the performance document.

columns.Name: SHOW_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates whethre the system will display a status field, at the performance document, for each item.

columns.Name: SHOW_PERCENT_COMPLETE
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will display a percent complete field, at the performance document, for each item

columns.Name: USE_PROFILE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will identify the most specific profile related to a worker's job data, then copy all content items for this content type, into the performance document.

columns.Name: PROFILE_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: This field stores the ID of a model profile that contains the content type specified.

columns.Name: USE_SPEC_PROFILE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will copy all the content items matching the specified content type, into the performance document.

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: This field is the profile ID of a specific model profile, used for copying content when generating performance documents.

columns.Name: USE_WORKER_GOALS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will copy goals from worker's goals into the performance document, when generating the performance document.

columns.Name: UPDATE_GOAL_WEIGHTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to update weights of the existing goals in PD from Goal Management

columns.Name: USE_SPEC_CONTENT_ITEM_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will allow the user to add content items of the content type to the section.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: USE_WRITING_ASSISTANT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the system will use writing assistant flag at the section definition

columns.Name: ROUNDING_RULE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the rounding rule that will be used for ratings that are calculated by the system. Valid values are Standard, Up and Down.

columns.Name: DECIMAL_PLACES
columns.Comments: Indicates the number of decimal places for calculated ratings.

columns.Name: MAPPING_METHOD_CODE
columns.Comments: Method to determine the rating when there is no exact match between the calculated rating and a rating level from the rating model used in the section. Valid values are Nearest, Lowest, and Highest.'

columns.Name: CALC_MAPPING_CODE
columns.Comments: With mapping method code, this field indicates how the calculated numeric score should be mapped to a rating level in the rating model. Valid values are Numeric Rating and Points Range.

columns.Name: USE_SEC_WEIGHTS_FOR_CALC
columns.Comments: Indicates section weight to be part of calcuation for the ratings of overall summary section.

columns.Name: ENABLE_CHILD_ITEMS_FLAG
columns.Comments: It indicates whether Behaviors defined as child items for Competencies in Profile Management are displayed in the Competency section.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_FUTURE_ITEMS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates about future development goals starting after performance document evaluation period.

columns.Name: EXCLUDE_INACTIVE_ITEMS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to exclude development goals whose status is inactive.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ENABLE_SECTION_COMMENTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to allow the user to enter a comment for the section.

columns.Name: ENABLE_ITEM_COMMENTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether item comments is enabled for the section.

columns.Name: EVALUATION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Goal evaluation type is to determine how that goal plan should be evaluated in a performance document.

columns.Name: ENABLE_SYNC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the template section is configured to use synchronized goals

columns.Name: INCLUDE_QSTNR_SCORING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Store whether to enable scoring for the questionnaire section.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_QSTNR_SCORE_OS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Store whether to include questionnaire score in overall summary ratings calculation.

columns.Name: SKILL_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: This field specifies the skill types to be included in the performance document as required by a model profile. Valid values are Core, Role and Others.

columns.Name: SKILL_PROGRESS_CODE
columns.Comments: This field specifies the skill progress to be included in the performance document. Valid values are All, Attained, and Developing.

columns.Name: LOCK_EVAL_WHEN_GOAL_SET_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to allow the performance goal section to be evaluated when the goal setting period is taking place.
